description: Guardian include/exclude patterns — shared between CI (release.yml) and runtime (MsGuardian.spoon). Both sides walk the same include globs, skip the same excludes, and agree on the manifest format.

manifest.description: Per-file SHA-256 manifest. CI generates + signs, Guardian verifies + checks hashes.

format.signature: <base64 RSA-2048 signature over sha256(minified JSON of version+generated+files)>
